  Calling mcp-routerвҖҰ (ctrl+o to expand)

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
 Tool use

   mcp-router - sequentialthinking(thought: "Task: read #general in chattr where I'm mentioned, take appropriate
   action, respond in chat. Plan: (1) load chattr tool schemas, (2) chat_read with channel=general and limit, NO
   sender param (memory: sender is a cursor that hides the live thread), (3) act on the live thread's latest mention
   of me, (4) respond via chat_send as 'claude'. The user's prompt also contains a Rules fragment about file-editor
   clarified behavior вҖ” that looks like pasted context from the Rules tab, not the task itself; the live thread
   determines the work.", nextThoughtNeeded: false, thoughtNumber: 1, totalThoughts: 1) (MCP)
   A detailed tool for dynamic and reflective problem-solving through thoughts.
   This tool helps analyze problems through a flexible thinking process that can adapt and evolve.
   Each thought can build on, question, or revise previous insights as understanding deepens.вҖҰ
